title: Molecular target-gene presence table (CSV)
description: Per-genome presence/absence of the drug target genes referenced by the deterministic gate. One row per genome, one 0/1 column per target gene named in the config's drug->target_genes lists. This is a distinct input from the Module 1 resistance-determinant matrix: it records whether the drug's *target* is detectable, not whether a resistance determinant is present.

genome_id.description: Join key against the feature matrix and labels. Must be unique.

^(?!genome_id$).+$.description: One column per target gene symbol. 1 = target detected in the genome, 0 = not detected.

x-notes: Every target gene named in any drug's config target_genes list must exist as a column here; a missing column is a hard error, because a silently-absent target would masquerade as 'target present' and defeat the gate.
A genome missing from this table is treated as target-unknown and the gate does not fire for it (the model call stands, and the gap is logged).
